findings.title: US-Iran high-level talks in Islamabad
findings.summary: Washington and Tehran held highest-level talks in decades in Islamabad amid missile threats and distrust. This engages I5 diplomatic channels, signaling de-escalation attempt despite ongoing tensions. Lower-level delegations scheduled for follow-up.
findings.claim_excerpt: Washington and Tehran meet in Islamabad for talks at the highest level in decades - yet with missiles, threats, and zero trust
findings.preliminary_assessment: Represents potential pause in escalation but fragile given mutual distrust and unresolved issues like US military presence.
findings.confidence_basis: Single primary source on event; no Tier 1 corroboration in results.

sources_cited.excerpt: meet in Islamabad for talks at the highest level in decades

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Event dated Apr 11 but relevant to window; lacks multi-source confirmation.

findings.review_reason: Verify if talks progressed or collapsed post-Apr 11

findings.title: Ongoing high-intensity fighting in Ukraine
findings.summary: Ukraine war persists with no conclusive victory, contributing over 40% of global conflict events. I2 military posture remains stable at high level, with persistent risk of escalation. No new deployments noted.
findings.claim_excerpt: The wars in Ukraine and Palestine continued to drive the level of violence, contributing over 40% of conflict events
findings.preliminary_assessment: Protracted stalemate increases miscalculation risks without trajectory shift.
findings.confidence_basis: Tier 1 ACLED data corroborated by multiple sources on persistence.

sources_cited.excerpt: wars in Ukraine... continued to drive the level of violence
the war persists. While it does, there is always the risk of... escalation

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: No daily ISW in results but ACLED confirms ongoing high levels.

findings.title: Fragile ceasefire holds in Gaza amid drop in deaths
findings.summary: Gaza sees drop in conflict-related deaths due to ceasefires, though remains top dangerous location with violence in 70% of territory. I2 posture de-escalating slightly but geographically diffuse. Over 70,000 killed since 2023.
findings.claim_excerpt: Palestine is the third-most-deadly place... drop in conflict-related deaths due to ceasefires in Gaza
findings.preliminary_assessment: Ceasefire reduces intensity but diffuse violence risks breakdown.
findings.confidence_basis: Tier 1 ACLED plus Statista ceasefire note.

sources_cited.excerpt: drop in conflict-related deaths due to ceasefires in Gaza
fragile ceasefire has been implemented in Gaza

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Consistent across sources on fragile status.

findings.title: Myanmar civil war at high violence levels with 1200+ groups
findings.summary: Myanmar conflict remains at high levels, most fragmented globally with over 1,200 armed groups active. I2 posture stable at extreme, driving sustained violence. Ranked top in ACLED Index.
findings.claim_excerpt: Myanmar is the most fragmented conflict... over 1,200 distinct armed groups
findings.preliminary_assessment: Fragmentation hinders de-escalation, sustains high violence.
findings.confidence_basis: [AUTO-DOWNGRADED from Confirmed: single source at Tier 0 — Analyst cron to verify] Tier 1 ACLED data.

sources_cited.excerpt: civil wars in Myanmar... continued at high levels

search_queries_run: Myanmar civil war updates April 2026 ACLED
research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Systematic under-coverage noted but ACLED provides strong signal.

findings.title: Sudan civil war drives extreme hunger and displacement
findings.summary: Sudan conflict causes economic/health/food systems collapse, widespread hunger/disease with difficult aid access. I6 displacement velocity high, second-deadliest globally. Fighting ongoing since 2023.
findings.claim_excerpt: Economic, health and food systems have completely collapsed. There is widespread hunger and disease
findings.preliminary_assessment: Humanitarian crisis accelerating, complicating military dynamics.

sources_cited.excerpt: widespread hunger and disease, and humanitarian access is difficult
Palestine is outranked in deadliness only by Ukraine and Sudan

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Tier 1 sources align on crisis severity.

findings.title: Haiti gang violence increasingly deadly to civilians
findings.summary: Haiti gang crisis more deadly, with over 4,500 killed in political violence and rising targeted civilian attacks. I2 posture escalating in lethality. Ranks top 10 in ACLED severity.
findings.claim_excerpt: Haiti became more deadly and dangerous to civilians: Over 4,500 Haitians were killed
findings.preliminary_assessment: Rising civilian targeting signals governance collapse trajectory.
